title: Opti-quick
description: Optimization mod with the features of optifine. Good for older Computers that can't handle modern minecraft.
body:
# Opti-Quick
### Easy to install Optimization modpack for minecraft.
Optimization Modpack made for Low-End PC's, Enjoy minecraft even with a potato pc. Settings set by default are very low, Includes Iris Shaders for Shader Support, Updates will release 1-14 days after release of new Minecraft version (hopefully). (FPS Counter Shown in gallery photo is not installed by default). ![FPS Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/287678bb0c178f2cd78385c0520094a05bec1162.png)
